articles.title: AI Is Cutting 60-80% of Editing Time — Here's the 5-Stage Script Pipeline Replacing Manual Workflows
articles.summary: The scripting phase is where most creators hemorrhage hours. A new 5-stage AI pipeline compresses 2-3 hours of writing into roughly 10 minutes, with automatic footage planning built into the output. The entire production chain — from ideation to upload — is being restructured around automation.

articles.title: Body Doubling + Digital Bouncers: The 2026 Focus Stack for Neurodivergent Creators
articles.summary: Virtual body doubling meets browser allowlisting in a combined strategy that leverages accountability and digital friction. Pair it with NOW/SOON/LATER task triaging for a system that actually sticks.

articles.title: Why Your Nervousness Reads as Enthusiasm — And 4 Other Camera Truths for 2026
articles.summary: With AI-generated video fatigue setting in, audiences are craving real, unpredictable human energy. Your imperfections are your edge now, not your liability.

articles.title: In Medias Res and the False Start: Two Narrative Weapons for Making History Feel Urgent
articles.summary: Drop your audience into the middle of a historical crisis, then rewind. Or set up the obvious story, then shatter the expectation. Stanford research confirms: stories beat facts for retention every time.
